/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libbzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/motor_commands__description.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/motor_commands__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/motor_commands__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/sensor_suite__description.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/sensor_suite__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/bzzz_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/bzzz_msgs/msg/detail/sensor_suite__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
